# uapi_mwan3_globals (Resource)

Mwan3 globals.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_mwan3_globals" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `local_source` (String) uci option local_source.
- `logging` (Boolean) uci option logging.
- `loglevel` (String) uci option loglevel.
- `mmx_mask` (String) uci option mmx_mask.
- `rtmon_interval` (Number) uci option rtmon_interval.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
